Entries.Name: Business Kweebec
Entries.Line: I know what you're getting at, but people overplay the whole 'nature versus nurture' thing. If you really look into it, a lot of traits are inherent to an individual.

Entries.Name: Business Kweebec
Entries.Line: There have even be scientific experiments, ridiculous as it sounds since most Kweebecs are equivalent to your... human hippies, I think. But in the races that produce twinned seedlings, the seedlings of the bunch--

Entries.Name: Business Kweebec
Entries.Line: --were separated, given to different groves, and what do you know? Same personalities. The only reason they wouldn't have that normally is because of sibling competition. Everyone has to be unique or whatever.

Entries.Name: Business Kweebec
Entries.Line: All I'm saying is that us people who germinated for that kind of environment -- wealth and power -- would thrive in it. We'd know how to make good use of it.

Line.Text: And when someone isn't, any attempt to do so ends up with them making a fool out of themselves. Just look at some of my investors. Gaia preserve me, some of the other directors aren't any better.
